Name: Yodel Roll
Description: From Exposure do a 360 and grab the line. Then go into a Back Yoda Roll.
From Nevermind go up spinning frontside 360 and land back in your normal stance.

Name: Infinity
Description: Start out as you would for a one bounce Yoda Roll but then keep rolling. Never stop!
Do you have any tips?: Tim invented this trick when going for a one bounce Double Back Yoda Roll.

Description: Similar to a Double Back Yoda Roll but grabbing the leash instead of the line.

Name: Soup Backflop
Description: Do a Can of Soup into a Backflop in the same bounce.
Do a Backflip but then passing Exposure you add a 180 before landing the trick.
Do you have any tips?: Think about landing the normal Backflip in switch so when you add the 180 you are back in your normal stance.

Name: Barrelflop
Description: Do a Barrel Roll and add a late Backflop.

Name: Yodermatt
Description: Double Back Yoda Roll with a 180 in the second Roll.

Name: Legolas
Description: Jump into the leash doing a frontflip from Exposure then use your foot to step into the leash and then back on the line.
Three Front Yoda Rolls in one bounce.

Name: Nevermindhty
Description: Start like a normal Nevermind but then push into the line with the foot that is already on the line to create momentum into a back roll. Use your second foot to hook the line and finish with a Back Almighty.

Technical Name: From sofa to handstand to sofa
Name: Catwheel
Description: Starting in sofa with ring front you, catch the line on your side and in 75% of way up in the bounce push to handstand to you are fully extended on the top of the bounce, after you continue in motion to side landing in sofa.
Do you have any tips?: Play with handstand from sofa and drop it to leashfall to get feeling of this position and land trick in side rotation.

Technical Name: From feet to handstand to sofa
Name: Catwheel from feet
Description: Before top of bounce you lean to catch line and push to handstand on the top, continue in side motion to drop it to sofa
Do you have any tips?: You should be familiar with basic catwheel and feel comfortable to drop trick from feet.

Technical Name: From sofa to handstand to exposure
Name: Catwheel to feet
Description: Starting in sofa push to handstand continue side motion landing to feet.
Do you have any tips?: Have solid Catwheel

Name: Vortex
Description: Ter o double sholder roll na base
Do you have any tips?: Executar com muita força

Name: Sushi-Flip
Description: Start with an early Sushi and add a Backflip to it
Like a regular Backflip but without using your hands.

Technical Name: Backbounce roll half spiral to feet
Name: Chill
Description: Start from backbounce and grab the line with one hand. Before the top of the bounce throw yourself to the side of the hand that grabs the line. Do a roll below the line, take with both hands and put your feet.
Do you have any tips?: Timing is key. When you throw yourself think of kicking up with your knees/feet to initiate the rotation.

Description: Rocket Mount with a 360 spinning to your backside.

Name: Sharkbite
Description: From Rocket you pull yourself up so you're able to bite the line and let go with the hands. Then grab the line again and drop back to Rocket.
Do you have any tips?: Watch out to not bite your lips

Technical Name: Makako to feet with an extra back yoda roll
Name: Gorilla
Description: Do a makako to feet and add an extra back yoda roll

Name: Batman
Description: You drop to Rocket slightly uncentered such that you can get some momentum by swinging to one side. From there you use the momentum to swing your legs to the other side and all the way up to hook the line with both feet (the Bat-Hang position), you let go with your hands and do a 360 under the line by regrabbing the line on the other side of your feet. Unhook your feet and land back in Rocket.
It's a Darth Vader with an extra roll.

Name: Backalomo
Description: Do a backbounce, when you stand up hook your foot under the line to do a back almighty.

Name: All-Nasty
Description: It's a Darkside Roll but you let go with the hands while you're doing the trick and hook with one foot to finish the trick like a Back Almighty.

Name: A chuparla
Description: Bounce hard, almost at the top of the bounce throw yourself backwards and do a backflip without touching the line. Put your hands up and grab the line to end in the rocket position.

Name: Sakalhombro
Description: Do a chill but instead of landing on your feet go to shoulder.
540 from Rocket to Sofa.

Name: Eclipse
Description: Just like an orbital to feet but throw the line to your backside. Land on your feet.
Do you have any tips?: Timing is key when throwing the line.

Description: Start with a frontside spin and then transition into the Back Almighty

Name: Chillin Vader
Description: Go to backbounce, do a chill but instead of going directly to feet do a darth vader motion to end in expo.

Name: Never panic
Description: Go to nevermind position. When you go up the bounce cross your foot and start a panic roll. Grab the line with both hands and put your feet.

Name: Backalomo 180
Description: Do a backbounce, when you go up hook your foot on the line and start a back almighty and when you are upside down start a 180 motion, en in feet.

Technical Name: Reverse super sonic but instead of a back yoda roll do a back almighty
Name: Reverse super mighty
Description: Do a reverse súper sonic but instead of doing a back yoda roll do a back almighty

Technical Name: Double super sonic. Rocket to double front yoda
Name: Emil Doppel-Wumms / david double sonic
Description: Go to rocket, kick with your feet to start a super sonic and add an extra front yoda roll.

Name: Reverse darth Vader?
Description: Go to rocket, then kick like you would for a Makako, rotate to land on your feet.

Name: King Kong
Description: With a big bounce , grab the line while starting a roll backwards and from there kick like you would on a Makako. Put both feet on the line to land in expo

Technical Name: Eclipse without touching the line to sofa
Name: Space eclipse to sofa
Description: Do a eclipse bot don’t use your hands to move the line, let the high tension bring the line back down and go to sofa.
Do you have any tips?: You need the right setup, some bungees and a lot of tensión on the line.

Description: Just do everything as you would for the Orbital to Feet, but then go to Double Drop Knee (or Crook).

Technical Name: A sushi pop no hands but leaving the line completely at some point
Name: Space sushi
Description: When you go up before reaching the top let go of the line with your feet, the line should do a sushi pop motion, with the high tensión you should go up while the line stops touching your body. Aim again with your feet to step on the line.
Do you have any tips?: You need the right setup up. Some bungees and a lot of tension on the line.

Name: Shoulder Vader
Description: From Shoulder you initiate a Back Shoulder Roll but then you quickly let go with the far hand and turn more sideways. From there you finish with a Darth Vader.

Technical Name: Sushi pop no hands from sofa late 360 to korean
Name: Space sushi late 360
Description: Do a sushi pop no hands to sofa, then when you stop touching the line do a late 360, grab the line and end in korean.
Do you have any tips?: You need the right setup. Some bungees and a lot of tension on the line.

Name: Impossible
Description: Do a front almighty but don’t use the foot to hook, just push the line to the side,  do the front flip and almost at the end of the rotation put your feet again to land in exposure.
Do you have any tips?: You need the right setup. Some bungees and a lot of tension in the line.

Name: Freak Nasty Roll
Description: Start with a Sick Nasty but add a 180 spin and finish with a Sick Nasty Roll

Technical Name: Space eclipse to double drop knee
Name: Space eclipse to DDK
Description: Do a eclipse but don’t touch the line with your hands, once the line goes around you land on DDK
Do you have any tips?: You need the right setup. Some bungees and a lot of tension.

Technical Name: Eclipse fett to feet without using the hands.
Name: Space eclipse
Description: Do an eclipse but don’t touch the line with your hands. Once the line goes around out your feet again. The timing of the kick is key.

Name: Nerd Flip
Description: Start with a normal Boomerang but instead of finishing it with a Sick Nasty Roll you finish it with a Rubiks Cube.

Technical Name: Darth Vader from Double Drop Knee
Name: Kneisenvader
Description: From Double Drop Knee Roll to the front until you are in the Rocket position and then use the momentum to finish with a Darth Vader

Name: Supervader
Description: Supersonic to Darth Vader... Not much else to say here!
Supersonic with a 360.

Technical Name: Darth kako with extra yoda roll
Name: Sauron
Description: Go to nevermind, from there start a darth kako, on mice you get the roll add another yoda roll. Land in exposure

Technical Name: Sakalorbital without touching the line with your hands
Name: Space sakalorbital
Description: Do a sakalorbital by kicking the line almost at the highest point of the bounce, rotate 180 let the line go around you and land again on your feet.
Just watch the video.. It's hard to describe :D

Name: Apocalypse
Description: Start with a normal Eisenvader but as soon as you are in the Rocket position you turn 180 and regrab the line to finish with a Reverse Rocket Mount.
From Rocket you immediately spin 180 and regrab the line and then finish with a Reverse Supersonic.

Technical Name: Front side 180 space eclipse to feet
Name: Space lord
Description: Do a space eclipse, when you kick the line rotate 180 to your front side, let the line go around you and land on your feet.

Technical Name: Makako to feet but at one point not touching the line
Name: Space kako
Description: Go to nevermind, start a Makako but let go the line with your hands, do the rotation until your feet find the line, end in exposure.

Name: Darth Maul
Description: From Expo you lean back as much as possible (as if you would do a back bridge) until you reach the line with one hand. Spin 180 and grab the line with the second hand, so that you end up in Rocket.

Name: Front Nirvana
Description: From Sofa you grab the line with both hands on the side and initiate a roll to the front. You immediately go into Belly and keep rolling but then add another 180, regrab one hand and land in Expo.

Name: Beyblade
Description: Drop to Rocket but with the leash wrapped around your legs. Then do a sideflip using the momentum that the wrapped leash gives you and go to feet.

Name: Space korean
Description: From korean change your leg to butt and from there let the line go to do a space orbital. Use your leg to catch the line in korean.

Name: Chill Nasty Roll
Description: Go to backbounce, grab the line below your back and throw your body to the same side of the grabbing hand, start a chill but instead of going to feet do a sick nasty roll.

Name: Bs space lord
Description: Do a space orbital but add a back side 180 to land facing the other anchor.
180 Almighty to DDK with an extra DDK roll.

Name: Rewind turtle
Description: Do a front yoda but change the direction of the spin to do a rewind and add another back yoda roll.

Name: Nirvana Attack
Description: Do a nirvana but instead of using your hands put hook your foot to spin.

Name: Full Orbit
Description: Start with a FS 180 then grab the line and do an Orbital but spin another 180 before landing it.
Do you have any tips?: Make sure to keep your body upright, otherwise you might end up just doing a Barrel Roll.

Name: No soup 180
Description: Start form soup position, hook your foot to do a no soup and add a late 180.
From Yisus let one hand go and step the same foot on the line, then put the second foot and let go with the second hand to land in Expo or Normal.

Technical Name: Front Sofa Roll to Front Nirvana
Name: 360 Tamatta Roll
Description: Start with a Front Sofa Roll and then go into a Front Nirvana.

Name: Flower Power
Description: From Korean start like you would do a flow but do 2 full spins, land on your feet.

Name: Shoulder roll almighty
Description: Do a shoulder roll to feet, instead of putting the second foot on the line do a hook to end with an almighty.

Name: Sugar Cube
Description: From Butt you spin backside and roll to your back, hook the line with your kneepit then put your other leg over the line so that you can step on the line with the hooking leg and finally put the second foot on the line.
Just watch the video...
Start with a BS 180 and then finish with an Orbital to Feet

Name: Han Solo Rewind
Description: Do a Han Solo but instead of doing the full rotation change the direction of the roll to land in exposure.

Name: 180 Han Solo
Description: Do a 180 from exposure while grabbing the leash, then do a Han Solo.
Start with a FS 360 and finish with a Sakalorbital

Name: Double Han Solo
Description: Grab the leash and pull to do the roll 2 times.

Name: Double Nasty
Description: Like a Sick Nasty but keep it going and add another one.

Name: Almighty Flop
Description: Do a almighty when you finish the rotation di a backflop
Almighty from Nevermind
FS 180 Almighty from Nevermind.

Name: Backbounce back almighty 360
Description: Start from backbounce get up, hook your foot under the line and do a 360 back almighty
360 Almighty from Nevermind.

Name: Yoda Rewind 180
Description: Do a frot yoda roll rewind but add a 180 at the last roll.
Start with an Orbital and finish with a Backflip.

Name: Invader
Description: Shoulder-Vader but not going to feet but to Shoulder.

Name: On-Handed Orbital
Description: Do an orbital but only use one hand to get the line to your feet again.

Name: Double Dislocator
Description: Go to dislocator from there do a double roll to feet

Name: Back imposible
Description: A back almighty but without putting the hook
Do you have any tips?: You need a lot of tension and maybe some bungees.

Technical Name: No hands front sofa roll to feet
Name: Sofa impossible
Description: Do a front sofa roll but don’t use the hands, throw yourself at the top, do the roll and catch the line with your feet.

Name: Turtle Bros
Description: From backbounce gran the line behind your head, pull so you start spinning on a horizontal axis. End facing the other anchor in backbounce

Name: Llamarada Yisus
Description: From yisus do a resurrection motion but add a 180 to land on your feet.

Name: Tortuga Koreana / korean turtle
Description: From backbounce grab the line behind your head and do a 360 spin to end in korean.

Name: Shoulder resurrection
Description: From shoulder go to yisus and from there do a resurrection
From Rocket Mount you do the second half of the Orbital motion and land to feet.

There are multiple ways to do this one, but one version is to do a Full Rocket followed by a Rocket 180 to Feet, meaning that the first 360 spin you do with the line at chest height and then go to feet on the finishing 180.
Reverse Rocket Mount but just before putting both feet on the line as you would normally, spin 180 and land in Expo.

Name: 5Nasty
Description: Begin with a Tre-Nasty but then regrab with your hands and add another 180 in the end.

Name: MasterVader
Description: 360 Darth Vader followed by another roll to feet

Name: Shoulder Prawn
Description: King Prawn to Shoulder
ShoulderVader with an additional roll.

Name: Shoulder Frontflip
Description: From Shoulder do a Frontroll but don't stop in Korean but keep going to land in Shoulder.

Name: Backbounce Spiral
Description: From Backbounce grab the line with one hand below your back and step on the line with the opposite foot. Turn towards the chest and swap both your hands and feet to be able to finish the full rotation.

Technical Name: Hammock Backroll from Feet to Feet
Name: Lasagna Flip
Description: Start with an early Hammock Roll from Feet and just when you finished the Hammock Roll part you add a Backroll to Feet.

Name: Dislocator
Description: Drop to Dislocate and finish the trick like you would for a Resurrection
Do you have any tips?: Make sure your shoulders are ready for it! First try it statically from Rocket, then drop in from Sofa and only when this feels safe you can start trying from feet.

Description: Start with a Shoulder Roll then add a Frontroll to Feet.
Spin 180 on your shoulder. You first have to regrab the far hand then to finish on the other shoulder you have to regrab the close hand (which on the other shoulder is now the far hand).
Watch the video...
Nevermind with a roll and a 360 ending in Expo.
Nevermind with a FS 540 spin.
180 Backflip but without using your hands

Name: Rewind Yo-Yo
Description: You drop to a leashfall and in the bottom of the bounce you wind yourself up in the leash then unwind again and use the momentum to get back up to the line. Finish in Expo.
Do you have any tips?:
You should probably wear a cup to protect your genitals (males and females!).
Having a shorter leash for this trick helps.

Technical Name: Leash Rewind to Reverse Rocket Mount
Name: Reverse Rewind Yo-Yo
Description: Drop to a leashfall and in the bottom of the bounce you wind yourself up in the leash, then unwind again and use the momentum to get back up to the line. Finish with a Reverse Rocket Mount.
Do you have any tips?:
You should probably wear a cup to protect your genitals (males and females!).
A short leash helps for this trick.

Name: Robinspin
Description: Three rolls from soup to standing in one bounce.
Do you have any tips?: Doing the trick chongo-style with a down leg for all three rotations lets you use that leg to huck each time you come around.

Technical Name: Is a Ddk 360 BS to spiral (360) to chest
Name: Misty Spin Roll
Description: Is a ddk 360 BS to other Spin like a spiral in trickline under line to chest
Do you have any tips?: Stay on the opposite side of the ddk to start the second turn below the line, all in one turn.

Description: Four Back Yodas in one bounce. Sounds hard right? It is!

Technical Name: Panic Roll to Darkside Roll in the same bounce. Could also be considered a Panic Roll Rewind to Feet.
Name: Doombringer
Description: Do a Panic Roll and set up for a Darkside Roll out of it. Similar to a Bangarang but starting with a Panic Roll.
Do you have any tips?:
The Panic Roll should be as fast as you can muster without the rotational force opening up your legs so that you can't get them on the line. I try to aim to get my feet on the line as quickly as possible so that I have something to pull against for the second half. Hand positioning for the Panic Roll is super wide so that there's space to fit the legs in between them.

The leash ring is best left between the legs but with the leash rope wrapped around the back of your leg so that you unwrap it during the Panic Roll. This will make it so that on the Darkside Roll portion of the trick the leash ring/rope is outside of your hands and completely out of the way of your feet as you sneak them onto the line.

If you're slow with getting your second foot up for the Darkside portion you'll end up imbalanced in the direction of the line and can fall sideways into it like an overhooked Almighty.

For me this trick took 7 bounces minimum.

Description: Start with a 360 almighty as you complete the first rotation reach down and grab the line and do a front barrel/yoda
Do you have any tips?: Focus on grabbing the line as you do the almighty so that you are grabbing the line as you come around on the top almighty to whip the barrel around quickly

Technical Name: From korean sick nastyroll to Nevermid
Name: Sick nastyroll and Nevermid
Description: From korean sick nastyroll to Nevermid
Do you have any tips?: Step on it hard

Name: Fire Mind
Description: From Korean, rotate backward, taking the line, making a roll, and following that roll into the Nevermid stance, ending in feet.
Do you have any tips?: Step on it hard

Description: From Korean grab the line with both hands in front of you. Towards the top of the bounce swing one leg over the line so that you end up in the belly position. Then swing the other leg over the line so that you are back in Korean, only facing the other direction this time.
Do you have any tips?: If it is hard to get the first leg over the line, try starting later in the bounce;As a preexercise you can practice the transition from Korean to Belly and vice verse in isolation before putting them together;
